hook: An archerfish can shoot insects out of the air.
core_fact: Archerfish hunt by firing precise jets of water at insects above the surface; jet dynamics and aim help knock prey down.
rework_reason: Gate 2 source acquisition partial pass: real Wikimedia Commons water-jet footage and five beat-mapped selected assets exist, but B04/insect-fall readability needs phone-size review or one clearer knockdown plate before render. Approved elevenlabs_george VO is also required before any render.

must_fix: confirm B04 insect-fall/knockdown readability at phone size or acquire one clearer plate
water jet must visibly connect fish mouth to insect target
avoid diagrams, labels, UI, stock-photo text, and ambiguous generic fish shots
approved elevenlabs_george VO before any render
source_quality_requirements.old_artifacts_status: new packet; Gate 2 source acquisition partial pass; no render yet

rework_artifacts.agent_note: Downloaded public-source archerfish assets and extracted real water-jet frames from Commons OGV. Selected 5 beat-mapped source assets and built a Gate 2 contact sheet. Held render because approved elevenlabs_george VO is absent and B04 needs phone-size clarity check.
